title: coffea mufindiensis subsp. australis
intro: Coffea mufindiensis subsp. australis is a subspecies of the Coffea mufindiensis plant, also known as the Tanzanian coffee tree, which is native to Tanzania and is closely related to the Arabica coffee tree. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. The health benefits of Coffea mufindiensis subsp. australis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
